database.category_guidance: For database choices, pay special attention to: migration reversibility, parameterized query support (security), test isolation (in-memory alternative), and structured error messages.

frontend.category_guidance: For frontend frameworks, pay special attention to: file-based routing (modularity), dev server hot reload (feedback), component isolation (multi-agent), and linter/formatter ecosystem (conventions).

backend.category_guidance: For backend frameworks, pay special attention to: type safety and validation (feedback), secure-by-default patterns (safety), structured error logging (executability), and API contract generation (multi-agent).

architecture.category_guidance: For architectural patterns, pay special attention to: module boundaries and change isolation (modularity), parallel development support (multi-agent), and whether the pattern is locally testable (executability).

authentication.category_guidance: For authentication, secure-by-default is critical. AI agents commonly produce insecure auth code unless the technology enforces security. Prefer established libraries over custom implementations.

technology.category_guidance: Evaluate this technology choice against AI implementation fitness. Focus on whether the AI can get fast, reliable feedback and whether documentation is accessible at implementation time.
